turns.content: Begin the session now with a short, warm, one or two sentence greeting that welcomes me and gently invites me to share what's on my mind. Keep it light — do not ask anything heavy yet.
"Hey there, I'm so glad you're here to talk. Can you start by telling me a little bit about what brings you in today?"
Mainly some stress about my relationship.
"Relationship stress can be really tough to deal with. What's been going on with your relationship that's been causing you stress lately?"
